channel.title: power on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in power on SoundsBrown

item.title: Power supply
item.description: Power supply is as follows: ATX PSU Fuse board https://cdn.sparkfun.com/datasheets/Kits/Benchtop%20Power%20Supply-v13.pdf I omitted the LED on the 5V rail and added two on the PWR_OK and 5VSB pins Regulation and filtering board Adapted from https://www.dropbox.com/s/pjoshuv31grkixq/Schematic_%2B-12v%20larger%20with%205v_%2B-12%20Volt%20Power%20Supply_20200217210146.pdf?dl=0 https://syntherjack.net/modular-synth-wall-wart-psu/ http://www.modularsynth.ru/en/diy/regulated_bipolar_psu/ See brownnote/kicad/psu Bus board Just stripboard with 5x2 headers

item.title: Voltage regulators
item.description: Beware of difference in pinout! Positive Negative

item.title: Power
item.description: Case contains an ATX power supply. Front panel breaks out the on/off switch, the standby and power on LEDs, and all the different positive voltages so it can be used like a bench supply. References: https://www.electronics-tutorials.ws/blog/convert-atx-psu-to-bench-supply.html Power connectors The backside contains bus boards that distribute +/-12V, +/-5V and GND using 5x2 pin headers and ribbon cables. TODO: Take a picture of the back.
